name: meok-nhvr-australia-mcp
title: Meok Nhvr Australia Mcp
description: Australia National Heavy Vehicle Regulator (NHVR) compliance MCP. Heavy Vehicle National Law fatigue (BFM/AFM), NHVAS modules (Mass/Maintenance/Fatigue), Chain of Responsibility, Performance-Based Standards (PBS), Electronic Work Diary (EWD), state-specific rules. By MEOK AI Labs.
